
```{python}
from skcausal.datasets import PolynomialDataset
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

dataset = PolynomialDataset(n=10000, treatment_dim_types=["continuous"],
x_to_y_degree=2, covariate_effect_scale=20, joint_effect_scale=.1, treatment_effect_scale=1)

X, t, y = dataset.load()

adrf = dataset.predict(X, t)

```

```{python}

plt.figure()
plt.scatter(t, y, alpha=0.5)
# argsort t (pl.DataFrame)
sorted_indices = t.to_numpy().argsort(axis=0).flatten()
plt.plot(t.to_numpy()[sorted_indices], adrf[sorted_indices], color="red")
plt.show()
```

```{python}
from skcausal.causal_estimators.ignore_covariates import DirectNoCovariates
from sklearn.neural_network import MLPRegressor
estimator = DirectNoCovariates(
    outcome_regressor=MLPRegressor(hidden_layer_sizes=(100, 100), max_iter=500)
)
estimator.fit(X, y=y, t=t)


```

```{python}
adrf_pred = estimator.predict(X, t)

plt.figure()
plt.scatter(t, y, alpha=0.5)
# argsort t (pl.DataFrame)
sorted_indices = t.to_numpy().argsort(axis=0).flatten()
plt.plot(t.to_numpy()[sorted_indices], adrf[sorted_indices], color="black")
plt.plot(t.to_numpy()[sorted_indices], adrf_pred[sorted_indices], color="red")
plt.show()
```
